name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 23 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks. v1.20: PRD-029 Sprint A — 3 UX-layer autonomy deliverables: (1) /agent-advisor skill — consults mm-agent-selection mental model + embedded CRUD-R-A map → recommends specialist agent with profile/rationale/invocation snippet; (2) Subagent ask-back protocol — `<<NEED_USER_INPUT:...>>` sentinel documented in AGENT-AUTHORING-GUIDE with parser for /forge-cycle + /autorun; (3) prompt-router UserPromptSubmit hook — keyword classifier emits non-blocking skill suggestions in additionalContext. Closes Gap A (knowing-which-command), B (subagent-needs-input), E (right-agent-for-job) from the autonomy vision. v1.19: /fpl-init operating contract v3 marker. v1.18: PRD-022 Tier A — 4 high-traffic skills MCP-first.
